formal_statement: If Reichweite = 0, stacking is random and sequence probability follows component proportions.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.chapter_or_appendix: Chapter 3 / Appendix: Modeling One-Dimensional X-Ray Patterns

formal_statement: If Reichweite > 0, conditional probabilities must constrain layer sequences.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.chapter_or_appendix: Chapter 3 / Appendix: Modeling One-Dimensional X-Ray Patterns

formal_statement: For R=1 and A component greater than 50%, B cannot follow B in the example ordering model.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.chapter_or_appendix: Chapter 3 / Appendix: Modeling One-Dimensional X-Ray Patterns
source.quote_fragment: B-type layer cannot follow a B-type layer
